title: Update Milestone Add Instructions Text Only

requirements.text: In the VisionBoard page, update only the instructional/helper text shown inside the 'Add Milestone' dialog or form to reflect the new instructions provided by the user. Do not change any layout, fields, logic, validation, state management, or styling of the milestone add flow — keep everything else exactly as it is in the current live version.

quotes: Milestones add should remain same as current live version change only the instructions I gave to you

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Add Milestone' dialog/form layout, fields, and functionality are identical to the current live version.
Only the instructional/descriptive text within the milestone add UI has been updated to match the user-provided instructions.
No other pages or components are affected.

constraints: Do not change the milestone add form fields, layout, validation, or logic.
Do not modify any backend files.
Do not alter any immutable frontend paths.
nonGoals: Redesigning or restructuring the milestone add dialog.
Adding or removing form fields from the milestone flow.
Changing any other page or feature.
